items.visual_description: An ornate, vintage-style perfume bottle made of faceted, transparent turquoise-blue glass. The bottle has a bulbous, multifaceted body with intricate gold filigree overlay around its shoulder. A textured gold band encircles the neck. The stopper is a large, diamond-shaped, faceted piece of the same turquoise-blue glass, set in a gold-colored mount.

overall_description: A single, luxurious and ornate perfume bottle with a magical or vintage aesthetic. The striking combination of turquoise-blue faceted glass and intricate gold detailing makes it a decorative and eye-catching piece.
